query: SELECT dogId, teamIdentifier, releasedAt, latitude AS captureLatitude, longitude AS captureLongitude, areaName AS captureAreaName, releaseLatitude, releaseLongitude, releaseAreaName, releaseDistanceMetres FROM dog_records WHERE releasedAt IS NOT NULL ORDER BY releasedAt DESC LIMIT 1;
